channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped rubbish by recycling bin, 3rd June
item.description:
The community continues to have an issue with rubbish being dumped by the recycling bin on Aberdour St by the glass shop. Please could you pay special attention to this area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leroy Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights not working, 3rd June
item.description:
At least 10 street lights not working and tonight I have witnessed people trying to break into cars as it is not lit up
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Breakspears Drive, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The trees in limes / big wood Avenue are seriously overgrown forcing pedestrians into the road. They have been so badly planted that the pavements are now living adding a further trip hazard, 3rd June
item.description:
As above These trees are not fit for purpose. They are totally unsuitable for this road - especially if the councils policy is not to trim them regularly. They need to be replaced with something more maintenance free

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Limes Avenue, Woodside Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 3rd June
item.description:
Despite several attempts to unblock this drain, it remains blocked. It needs a really deep clear out. I think it's full of tarmac and other road debris, but deep down. It's no good sending a regular drain clearing truck. It needs something much bigger!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By street light marker 29, 3rd June
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Several potholes spread over a half mile, 2nd June
item.description:
These potholes run from outside Christ church to just below Sidcup Workingmens' Club on Main Road.A string of them have opened up since Christmas.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 139, Main Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kids playground in poor condition, 2nd June
item.description:
The playground has fallen into a state of disrepair and presents a serious risk of injury to children and other members of the public. Issues include broken equipment, damaged flooring, exposed metal, loose bolts, broken fencing, sharp edges, etc.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sibthorpe Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big boards tipped over planting, 2nd June
item.description:
These boards have been left here for a few days atleast and are crushing all the plants the local community have planted here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70, Bagshot Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 2nd June
item.description:
Bags of rubbish and other waste dumped on a daily basis at entrance to Setchell Estate near Dunton Rd. It's an eyesore and makes the estate look dirty and uncared for.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazel Way, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road bad I have tripped a number of times while crossing, 2nd June
item.description:
Road in even holes and cracked surface

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Twigg Close, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp doesn’t work, 2nd June
item.description:
The street lamp on a corner/stairs of Abbey Crescent and Milton Road is broken and the street is very dark.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Crescent, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood dumped in bins full to brim, 2nd June
item.description:
One day after bin day 3 men came in a car and dumped a load of wood in our bins so full we cant use them

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carter Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 bikes been left here for a week, 2nd June
item.description:
2 bikes been left here for a week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rowley Gardens, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All street lighting out in Dalston Square between Dalston Lane and Roseberry Place, 2nd June
item.description:
All the lighting out, the above describes everything.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roseberry Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: All out - three or more street lights in a row

item.title: Its blocking public pathway way, 2nd June
item.description:
Parked diagnol

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westhorne Avenue, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 2nd June
item.description:
2x counts of dog faeces, 1 fresh, 1 old
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Seats damaged and left on pavement, 2nd June
item.description:
Bus stop seat smashed up and left on floor. Not collected by road sweeps and left on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 220, Avery Hill Road, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain causing road floods, 2nd June
item.description:
Drain completely blocked causing road floods and hazards to pedestrians trying to cross
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chislehurst Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 25 Kenilworth Road, 2nd June
item.description:
Cupboard doors

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenilworth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Graffiti, 2nd June
item.description:
Graffiti
